items.localizedExplanation: displays video, map, elevation chart, trackpoint table, and document contents.
items.explanation: displays video, map, elevation chart, trackpoint table, and document contents.
items.name: The GPX-V Document Window

items.localizedExplanation: contains the video player and selection controls.
items.explanation: contains the video player and selection controls.
items.name: The Video Workspace

items.localizedExplanation: plays the imported and merged video files.
items.explanation: plays the imported and merged video files.
items.name: The Video Player

items.localizedExplanation: shows applied titles and filters. Click to edit.
items.explanation: shows applied titles and filters. Click to edit.
items.name: The Title and Filter Control

items.localizedExplanation: moves the selection one second backward.
items.explanation: moves the selection one second backward.
items.name: The Tick Backward Button

items.localizedExplanation: shows the first, middle, and last frames of the selection.
items.explanation: shows the first, middle, and last frames of the selection.
items.name: Selected Video Frames

items.localizedExplanation: moves the selection one second backward.
items.explanation: moves the selection one second backward.
items.name: The Tick Forward Button

items.localizedExplanation: controls selected video and trackpoints. Slide, click or ⇧-click to change the selection. Use the buttons at each end to adjust the ends of the range by one second at a time.
items.explanation: controls selected video and trackpoints. Slide, click or ⇧-click to change the selection. Use the buttons at each end to adjust the ends of the range by one second at a time.
items.name: The Selection Range Slider

items.localizedExplanation: displays your route.
items.explanation: displays your route.
items.name: The Route Map

items.localizedExplanation: switches between traffic and satellite views.
items.explanation: switches between traffic and satellite views.
items.name: The Map Type Control

items.localizedExplanation: zooms out to view the entire route.
items.explanation: zooms out to view the entire route.
items.name: The Zoom Out Button

items.localizedExplanation: zooms in as close as possible on the selected trackpoint.
items.explanation: zooms in as close as possible on the selected trackpoint.
items.name: The Zoom In Button

items.localizedExplanation: shows route elevation and slope gradient. Click or ⇧-click to select trackpoints.
items.explanation: shows route elevation and slope gradient. Click or ⇧-click to select trackpoints.
items.name: The Elevation Chart

items.localizedExplanation: shows applied changes in speed. Click to edit.
items.explanation: shows applied changes in speed. Click to edit.
items.name: The Speed Change Control

items.localizedExplanation: lists the GPS trackpoints in order. Click a row to select the point, ⇧-click to select a range. Arrow keys work too.
items.explanation: lists the GPS trackpoints in order. Click a row to select the point, ⇧-click to select a range. Arrow keys work too.
items.name: The Trackpoint Table

items.localizedExplanation: shows the document change history, checks for potential problems, and current project status.
items.explanation: shows the document change history, checks for potential problems, and current project status.
items.name: The Information View

items.localizedExplanation: shows three classes of available information. Click the one you want to see.
items.explanation: shows three classes of available information. Click the one you want to see.
items.name: The Information Option Control

items.localizedExplanation: perform available actions. Grouped by video, video and GPS, and GPS.
items.explanation: perform available actions. Grouped by video, video and GPS, and GPS.
items.name: The Action Buttons

items.localizedExplanation: imports one or more .mp4 video files
items.explanation: imports one or more .mp4 video files
items.name: The Import Video Button

items.localizedExplanation: deletes audio tracks
items.explanation: deletes audio tracks
items.name: The Remove Audio Button

items.localizedExplanation: trims from the start of the video until the first selected trackpoint
items.explanation: trims from the start of the video until the first selected trackpoint
items.name: The Trim From Start Button

items.localizedExplanation: trims from the last selected trackpoint until the end of the video
items.explanation: trims from the last selected trackpoint until the end of the video
items.name: The Trim Until End Button

items.localizedExplanation: opens an editor to apply image filters to the selected video to compensate for shadows, glare, etc.
items.explanation: opens an editor to apply image filters to the selected video to compensate for shadows, glare, etc.
items.name: The Video Filter Button

items.localizedExplanation: opens an editor to add text to the video for a selected segment
items.explanation: opens an editor to add text to the video for a selected segment
items.name: The Titles Button

items.localizedExplanation: shares a frame or clip
items.explanation: shares a frame or clip
items.name: The Share Video Button

items.localizedExplanation: exports a syncrhonized .mp4 file
items.explanation: exports a syncrhonized .mp4 file
items.name: The Export Video Button

items.localizedExplanation: opens an editor to apply speed adjustments to video and GPX simultaneously.
items.explanation: opens an editor to apply speed adjustments to video and GPX simultaneously.
items.name: The Speed Adjustment Button

items.localizedExplanation: deletes selected trackpoints and video
items.explanation: deletes selected trackpoints and video
items.name: The Segment Delete Button

items.localizedExplanation: controls the direction of immediate synchronization of video and trackpoints
items.explanation: controls the direction of immediate synchronization of video and trackpoints
items.name: The Directional Synch Menu

items.localizedExplanation: imports a GPX file
items.explanation: imports a GPX file
items.name: The Import GPX Button

items.localizedExplanation: adds a trackpoint at the  location on the map at the time specified in video
items.explanation: adds a trackpoint at the  location on the map at the time specified in video
items.name: The Add Trackpoint Button

items.localizedExplanation: deletes the selected trackpoints
items.explanation: deletes the selected trackpoints
items.name: The Delete Trackpoints Button

items.localizedExplanation: Edits the selected trackpoints
items.explanation: Edits the selected trackpoints
items.name: The Trackpoint Edit Button

items.localizedExplanation: interpolates a route between two selected points
items.explanation: interpolates a route between two selected points
items.name: The Route Interpolation Button

items.localizedExplanation: Adjusts elevations and gradients
items.explanation: Adjusts elevations and gradients
items.name: The Elevation Button

items.localizedExplanation: exports a synchronized GPX file
items.explanation: exports a synchronized GPX file
items.name: The Export GPX Button

items.localizedExplanation: shows About This Mac, System Settings..., Location, App Store, Recent Items, Sleep, Restart..., Shutdown..., Lock Screen, Log Out...
items.explanation: shows About This Mac, System Settings..., Location, App Store, Recent Items, Sleep, Restart..., Shutdown..., Lock Screen, Log Out...
items.name: The Apple Menu

items.name: The GPX-V Menu

items.explanation: shows New, Open…, Open Recent, Import GPX..., Import Video...
items.name: The File Menu

items.localizedExplanation: shows Undo, Redo, Cut, Copy Selected Rows, Paste
items.explanation: shows Undo, Redo, Cut, Copy Selected Rows, Paste
items.name: The Edit Menu

items.localizedExplanation: shows Font, Text
items.explanation: shows Font, Text
items.name: The Format Menu

items.localizedExplanation: shows GPX, Video, Video & GPX
items.explanation: shows GPX, Video, Video & GPX
items.name: The Tools Menu

items.localizedExplanation: shows Show Toolbar, Customize Toolbar…, Show Sidebar, Enter Full Screen
items.explanation: shows Show Toolbar, Customize Toolbar…, Show Sidebar, Enter Full Screen
items.name: The View Menu

items.localizedExplanation: shows Minimize, Minimize All, Zoom, Zoom All, Fill
items.explanation: shows Minimize, Minimize All, Zoom, Zoom All, Fill

items.explanation: shows GPX-V Help, GPX-V Quick Reference
